title: House 4 side-yard search — Pattern E 4 kids + Joe false alarm
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: fairy princess
- @Eva: pumpkin onesie
- @Isabel: friend in unicorn costume
- @Leo: toddler friend in green dinosaur onesie w/ spiky back ridge.
- @Joe: cream-gold Pomeranian dog in red-and-black-spotted ladybug body costume.
STRICT COMPOSITION: exactly 4 kids + 1 dog total. No extras, no doubles, no background figures. Each character appears EXACTLY ONCE.

Multi-shot composition. Continuity from clip 12: family moving off the porch around toward the side yard. Composition anchored on pre-rendered Pattern E group still (image-to-video reference) for Shot 1. Motion-only prompt — the still defines who, where, and what they look like.

Shot 1 (0-3s, wide eye-level, slow hand-held settle, hold on Pattern E group still anchor) — Elements: @ep15-clip13-group
Hold the Pattern E composition exactly: 4 kids + Joe-the-bug arranged on side-yard grass, warm twinkling lights on side fence behind. Tails wag, kids in costume, no character changes position. Single dog, no doubles. @Eva, looking around: "Where could she BE?" @Isabel, helpfully: "Mom got us a flashlight!"

Shot 2 (3-6s, MCU OTS, slow tracking pan, slow push in on Joe) — Elements: @ep15-clip13-group
Tighter on Eva and Joe-the-bug at the right side of the group. Joe's nose dips down to the side-yard grass for a small in-place sniff, then lifts and pivots his fluffy face toward the side gate, ears perked, tail wagging fast — all four paws stay planted, his leash goes briefly taut. Eva's upper body leans a tiny bit toward Joe. Sara, voice from the group: "Joe found something! Look!"

Shot 3 (6-8s, MCU OTS, slow tracking pan, slow pan right to background) — Elements: @ep15-clip13-group
Follow the line of Joe's gaze. A small striped tabby cat walks past in the side-yard background — soft fur, ordinary cat, never scary.

Shot 4 (8-10s, medium-wide, slow pan left back + slow pull back) — Elements: @ep15-clip13-group
Return to the Pattern E group still composition. Joe turns his fluffy face back toward Eva. Eva, looking down at Joe softly: "Joooooe! That's a CAT!" Sara giggles: "Try again, Joe!" Isabel: "You're a great search dog, Joe!" Joe wags his tail faster, refocused. Leo claps softly.

Lighting: warm twinkling string lights, soft purple porch glow drifting around the corner.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, kid-show.
cameraStyle: static medium-wide on Pattern E group still into a slow push in to a soft medium on Joe, slow pan right to the cat reveal, slow pan left back to the kids, capped by a slow pull back
closingFrame: Side-yard medium-wide at @ep15_house4_isabel_cottage — Pattern E group still composition holding: Sara left, Isabel center-left, Leo center-right, Eva right; Joe-the-bug at Eva's left side, fluffy face turned softly toward Eva, tail mid-wag; tabby cat exiting frame right; soft warm string lights on the side fence.
